channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [CAST][STAFF][公开] MyAnimeList Dark Summoner Dekiteiru 公开 Main 声优阵容, 制作阵容, Fall 2026 Debut
item.description: WWWaveCorporation's Deregula animation label opened an official website for the television anime adaptation of Shaoh's Dark Summoner to Dekiteiru (I'm Dating a Dark Summoner) web manga on Friday,... | 来源: MAL | 原文: 'Dark Summoner to Dekiteiru' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Fall 2026 Debut
